title: ECAM pre-commit panel: show actual error output instead of AP DISCONNECT
description: When a pre-commit step fails (e.g., branch check, lint-staged), the ECAM panel shows 'AP DISCONNECT' instead of the actual error message from the subprocess. The panel should display the tail of the subprocess output so the developer can see what went wrong without re-running the command manually.
acceptanceCriteria: When a pre-commit step fails, the ECAM panel shows the last few lines of subprocess stderr/stdout
The actual error message (e.g., 'on protected branch main') is visible in the panel
The 'AP DISCONNECT' text is replaced with meaningful error content
The panel still shows the step label, status indicator, and duration
notes: The root cause is likely in packages/quality-gate/src/precommit/panel.tsx — the failed step rendering does not show the tail output from StepState.
